rows.source: Manual report: Brunei Forestry / Ulu Temburong NP — Ulu Temburong National Park; definition differs per jurisdiction — https://www.forestry.gov.bn/
Manual report: FAO / Brunei Dept of Agriculture & Agrifood — Approx paddy production 2023 (FAO ~3.7k t); small-scale local rice — https://www.agriculture.gov.bn/
Manual report: Global Data Lab Subnational HDI — UNDP HDR 2025 gives 9.3; GDL 9.28 used for one consistent source — https://globaldatalab.org/shdi/table/msch/

Manual report: Brunei Tourism Industry Performance Report 2024 (Tourism Development Dept) — Replaces stale World Bank 2020 figure; official 2024 visitor arrivals (air+land+sea) — https://www.tourism.gov.bn/SiteCollectionDocuments/Statistics/20250228_Brunei%20Darussalam%20Tourism%20Industry%20Performance%20Report.pdf
Manual report: UNESCO World Heritage List — No inscribed WHS (tentative list only) — https://whc.unesco.org/en/statesparties/bn

Manual report: Indonesia Ministry of Forestry (taman nasional) — 8 federal taman nasional in Kalimantan; large federal parks - not scale-comparable to MY state parks — https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_national_parks_of_Indonesia
BPS Indonesia (national by-province) (unweighted mean of 5/5 provinces, approx)
BPS Indonesia (unweighted mean of 1/5 provinces, approx)
BPS Indonesia (unweighted mean of 2/5 provinces, approx)
BPS Indonesia (unweighted mean of 5/5 provinces, approx)
BPS Indonesia (unweighted mean of 5/5 provinces, approx)
BPS Indonesia (unweighted mean of 4/5 provinces, approx)
Manual report: UNESCO World Heritage List — No inscribed WHS in Kalimantan (tentative only) — https://whc.unesco.org/en/statesparties/id
BPS Indonesia (unweighted mean of 5/5 provinces, approx)
Manual report: Sabah Parks — Parks managed by Sabah Parks statutory body; definition differs per jurisdiction - not scale-comparable — https://www.sabahparks.org.my/

Manual report: DOSM Abridged Life Tables Malaysia 2024 — Life expectancy at birth (both sexes); reported via DOSM/Bernama 2024 release — https://www.dosm.gov.my/portal-main/release-content/abridged-life-tables-malaysia-2024
Manual report: Global Data Lab Subnational HDI — Mean years of schooling adults 25+; comparable to BPS RLS used for Kalimantan — https://globaldatalab.org/shdi/table/msch/

Manual report: Sabah CM (via Malay Mail/Daily Express) — Full-year 2024 ~3.2 million (rounded official statement) — https://www.malaymail.com/news/malaysia/2024/10/11/sabah-set-to-surpass-three-million-tourist-arrivals-in-2024-revenue-hits-rm488b-says-state-minister/153296
Manual report: UNESCO World Heritage List — Kinabalu Park (natural 2000) — https://whc.unesco.org/en/statesparties/my
Manual report: Forest Department Sarawak — Includes many smaller parks; definition differs per jurisdiction - not scale-comparable — https://forestry.sarawak.gov.my/web/subpage/webpage_view/1012
Manual report: Sarawak Energy (via Bernama) — Domestic electrification rate end-2023 (rural coverage 98.4%) — https://bernama.com/en/news.php?id=2281533

Manual report: DOSM Abridged Life Tables Malaysia 2024 — Life expectancy at birth (both sexes); reported via DOSM/Bernama 2024 release — https://www.dosm.gov.my/portal-main/release-content/abridged-life-tables-malaysia-2024
Manual report: Global Data Lab Subnational HDI — Mean years of schooling adults 25+; comparable to BPS RLS used for Kalimantan — https://globaldatalab.org/shdi/table/msch/

Manual report: Sarawak Ministry of Tourism (via The Star) — Full-year 2024 visitor arrivals (domestic + international) — https://www.thestar.com.my/news/nation/2025/02/21/sarawak-exceeds-2024-tourist-arrival-target-by-20-rakes-in-rm1245bil
Manual report: UNESCO World Heritage List — Gunung Mulu (2000) + Niah National Park (2024) — https://whc.unesco.org/en/statesparties/my

fire_hotspots.source: Global Forest Watch (VIIRS), sum of 4/5 provinces

deforestation.source: Global Forest Watch, sum of 4/5 provinces
